subcodes.first_line: ...This Day is God's Day, and this Cause His Cause. Happy is he who hath renounced this world, and clung to Him Who is the Dayspring of God's Revelation
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Hands of the Cause, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @call to action
